problemOrders.notes: Tough Avella cust but old order
Ehh.. Half of this is ready to ship, customer has been slow, looking into
Shipped half, sold it, been holding on us. Tough Avella customer perfect example of something that just needs to be cancelled after a good follow up process

problemOrders.customer: Low Country Homes and Designs LLC

problemOrders.notes: Old; probably a cancel after another follow up
Surprised to see this. Half available. CS looking into
Old; probably a cancel after another follow up

discussionPoints.notes: Ship some now; ship other later. Big customer addition
2 orders - 1 mixed container shipping June; 1 warehouse order that they want to ship June so they can sell into it
New customer; $7,500 credit limit (conservative), shipped partial, do we break limit to get them the rest of the product? I told Tammy yes on this one
This is a recurring issue and a constant battle for CS. Higher % than we'd want being CC. Protects us on credit but hurts speed
